Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. Cool, either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: I'm excited but terrified all at the same time.
item.description: Long story short I'm having dinner with coworker tomorrow. She was the one who invited me over to her house for dinner. We don't talk much at work since she works in a different department and leaves shortly after I get there. She's amazing and beautiful and I'm boring and socially awkward. Wish me luck IMGUR!

item.title: In otter news

item.title: Things are getting better.
item.description:
Good morning everyone! About a week ago I posted about how I was assaulted and evicted from the house I was living in by family after I snapped at their extreme rightwing political views. (for anyone wanting context check my previous post) Since then I have been looking for a place to stay that will also accept my cat. I found a place about 2 days ago and have since moved in. My cat will be joining me tomorrow! It's a bit of a hole, but it will do for now. I have a few things to say to you guys; For those of you who offered me words of support and kindness, thank you. This kept me going through those long nights. You are such a supportive community and it is so heart warming to see. To those of you who reached out with financial support. Without you, I wouldn't have been able to pay my bond without going into debt. So thank you for helping me stay in the positive and reuniting me with my cat. To that one guy who asked if I was going to become a nazi. I've thought about it and decided it's not the lifestyle for me. For those of you wondering about the legal side, my father has been charged with assault and I'm now in talks with a lawyer about my legal options for the eviction. For what comes next, now that I have ground beneath me, I'll slowly start picking myself back up and putting everything back together. Stay strong you beautiful people, thank you so much for everything and enjoy some memes.
Also kitty cat.
item.dc:creator: MyNameIsBrentAndIWouldLikeToSeeGoodDogs

item.description: Not mine, but I think the best dogs are always worth sharing!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: I've been working the past three years on a paper plane game
item.description:
Hey, I've spent a lot of my free times working on a paper plane game where you fold your own paper plane, write a message and carry it to the end.
The best way I can describe it is a semi-open world adventure paper plane game where you can fold into a crumpled paper ball to gather momentum and transform back into a paper plane to glide over different styled worlds. A few months ago I released a Steam Page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1617230/Paper_Sky/ And I'm currently gearing up to release a Kickstarter so that I can build a community that love and support my work: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/bruteforce/paper-sky I'm working really hard right now to make a free public demo available to all so even those who can't buy it can test it out.
I have an art traditional background and I've always wanted to make the case that video games can be art, and I hope this could be my contribution to the whole debate
There's 12 different styles in the whole game, the first one being from Paperman a short film made by Disney that inspired me greatly to develop my own ideas
I'm trying to get accurate physics in my game by using real data references. My dad works on airplane and always answers my questions on "Can the airplane behave like this or will it fly through a wall of fire" etc..
My game is developed in Unity which I grew to like because you can make your own tools and own physics.
Someone from Imgur told me that I had to pay the doggo tax, so here are my 4 little doggos that I'm taking care of while I work on my dream game and that support me everyday. You get bonus point if you recognize where this photo was taken from, (this is where I live and it's in France). Cheers!
item.dc:creator: Anstabo

item.title: a small cuttlefishsticks collection: fish
item.description:
So... actually they're not. They're definitely bigger than a nerf football, but actually mostly they're only about 30cm long, though specimens have been found that were a meter long, which is still horrifyingly large for something that looks like that.
Made by Oregonian sculptor Keith Jellum, this sculpture can be found over a seafood restaurant in Portland.
item.dc:creator: cuttlefishsticks

item.title: I finally got approved for surgery!
item.description: After a lengthy wait time, I've finally received my Doctor Referral for gender affirming surgery. I'm going to be scheduling my first appointment to discuss the procedure tomorrow and I'm honestly super thrilled that I'm so headstrong about my transition. I never thought I'd really get to this point in my transition, somehow. But now that I'm faced with an abundance of options, I don't know which one I'll end up deciding with for my first. Also, here's a picture I recently finished drawing of my favorite OC. Viral edit: Thank you to everyone who's commenting with words of support and encouragement, it always makes me feel good knowing there's at least somewhere on the Internet that I can go to and expect support. You guys are so awesome! - - - - - - - - - - - - FAQ edit: I've noticed a few people asking about what these 'abundance of options' I have are, so I figured I'd include the list that I'm currently aware of that can be covered under health insurance in California and are now considered 'medical necessities' to me due to having been transitioning for over a year. The list, to my knowledge, is as follows: Breast augmentation, liposuction, facial feminization, vocal feminization, Brazilian Butt Lift, Hip widening, laser hair removal/electrolysis, orchiectomy, vaginoplasty, abdominoplasty and tracheal shave. I'm likely forgetting a few, but these are all the ones I'm aware of that are available to Trans women. Obviously none are necessary and the importance of each varies from person to person. In any case, if anyone has any questions they'd like to share with me, feel free to do so here or DM me directly and I'll do my best to answer any inquiries. - - - - - - - - - - - - Shine brightly, beautiful people.
item.dc:creator: MatronOfMorgues

item.title: Images of Note: Fibre optic friday
item.description:
I have a wooden bat'leth but I'm not going to get dressed and put on makeup for this.
yeah pretty much
I feel personally attacked.
More people should do that with people who are like "we bought a house at 19."
fuckin' hec
owo
i hate...
E D G I N G
mood
reverse Doom
owo
Damian would be too smart to do something stupid. Now DICK...
s l i d e
I am very aware of sheep. I had a weird experience with them where I was hiking out in the Pentlands and at a crossroads a massive crowd of them just stopped, let me cross, and then continued on their merry way. No Farmer. No Sheepdog. Just Sheep. I have never been do confused in my life. If they had hands with opposable thumbs they very will would own machine guns, they would sheer their OWN wool and we would all be vegetarians buying wool from sheep at the market.
Egg
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: No Self-Respecting Witch Would Do Otherwise
item.dc:creator: hahway

item.title: About 2 years ago I woke up and made a decision to change my life forever - a little motivation for those of you working on your own resolutions this year
item.description: Hi everyone Every now and again I like to make a post here sharing a before and after in the hopes of inspiring at least one person to make their own change Background story I was over 275 pounds and experiencing quite a bit of health issues for such a young age (24) Terrible back pains, brain fog, no energy, no motivation, sleeping 12+ hours a day, eating 4000+ calories like it was a snack I knew I couldn't continue like this and I felt so controlled by food. I wanted to see if losing weight could help my overall health I woke up on October 20, 2021 and said enough was enough. By August of 2022 I was down 100+ pounds - My focus switched from weight loss to maintaining my new weight and strength training My back pain completely disappeared, brain fog is gone, energy and motivation are levels I've never experienced before, and I just overall feel the best I've felt mentally / physically No surgeries, no weight loss products or BS diets / gimmicks - hard work in the gym + calorie deficit was my solution After losing over 100 pounds in 2022 I’ve now maintained the loss for over 1 year. I’m currently about 175 If you're struggling with your weight I hope this can give you just a little bit of inspiration today
item.dc:creator: ibeatfood

item.title: Con: I no longer have time to read about fish. Pros: I no longer have to listen to an old woman bitch about LGBT customers!
item.description:
I was a cashier at a gas station, we had our crazy calls and some truly insane moments, but I genuinely enjoyed it, other than my coworkers being 20-30 years older than me. Suddenly my boss moved me over to the deli. I got a pretty large pay bump, and I get to do crazy and stupid things with food! For example:
I said to one of my coworkers that I could deep fry anything with the tempura batter I made. She huffed, rolled her eyes, and said "really? Anything?" I give you deep fried lettuce, an affront to God. You're welcome.
item.dc:creator: NotaScientologist

item.dc:creator: beergeek

item.title: I'm just so tired
item.description: My mom has been hospitalized since August (cancer and a bunch of things that came with it). I won't go into great detail but despite everything going on with her health, she could have been home already or at the very least at the tail end of rehab. But she is literally refusing to do anything but lay there. People absolutely have the right to choose whether they live or die, but that's not what she's doing. What she's doing is complaining to her kids to "help her" because she claims to want to get better, but is refusing to do anything to help herself. It's like watching someone drown and throwing them a life preserver over and over again, and while they yell at you to help them, they aren't even attempting to reach for the thing. She's currently in a lot of pain because she won't let the nurses turn her so she has a massive pressure sore. She yelled at me asking why I won't help her and when I tried to explain that the nurses need to turn her she basically told me to be quiet. I'm tired. At this rate she's definitely going to die in the hospital, and she's so deep in the pain med cycle now that her moods are basically either "in pain, jonesing, and irritable" or "doped and asleep". I'm angry at her, I'm angry at the situation, and it turns out that my mom, who always used to accuse people of "being unwilling to put in the work for their health" is a big freaking hypocrite. Then of course theres the guilt and disappointment and hopelessness and numbness. Edit #1: A little added info - there really isn't any reasoning with her at this juncture. Her mentation has taken a huge jump backward recently and the psych eval this morning is saying vascular dementia is likely. Hence my venting to you all. Thank you for all the kindness. Edit #2: Thanks guys. Truly. You can't know how much... relief? I guess that would be a good word... relief that I feel hearing that this isn't an unusual experience. It's like I just had group therapy with the Imgur crew. I wish none of us had to go through any of this, but that's just life I suppose. As a thank you, please accept my humble offerings of a picture of my parrot. https://i.imgur.com/SKORKpj.jpg PPPPS. My brother is a rock and we've been leaning on each other a lot. I'm definitely not going it alone, which I'm incredibly lucky for. My current coping method is reading. A lot. Like... a book a day. *thank jebus for Kindle Unlimited*
item.dc:creator: AnnieGoolahee

item.title: Has scale modeling gone too far?
item.description:
Hold on to your butts, today we're going to go one step further, by creating a scale model of scale model paraphernalia!
[This above picture was meant to be the last one, but imgur decided it would look better in second place by messing up my order. Who am I to judge?]
Final result first, insert obligatory cookbook reference about childhood memories of this X-acto that I've used to do too few scale models when I was younger. Done? Okay, let's skip to the recipe.
First, we're gonna need some 2mm aluminium tube that I bought for an upcoming project (Since Youtube does double ads now, it'll trigger an unnecessary second backstory about finding 1960's blueprint of a blueprints cabinet). You wish you could skip, didn't you? Anyway, back to the project.
Next step will be to strip some vintage wires that were used to connect speakers to a Hi-Fi system, and use only the plastic insulation to do the black part of this specific X-acto.
Then a first mock-up assembly test, showing the blade cut in the bottom of a pringles can (one of my favourite source of thin sheets of metal for modeling purposes)
When you went partying, I studied the blade: at first, it was just a triangle for scaling purposes, then came a second part when I nearly broke the thin base multiple times and realized it would be waaaaay not centered. Third one had first two holes drilled, then the head shaped, then using my full-scale X-acto, carving the base. Wish me luck.
Thank you for wishing me luck, it worked! I'll slide it all the way into the insulation of the hi-fi wiring, then into the tube, and add a sewing needle for good measure. But, mistake!
At this point, I realized my old handle had a disgraceful line in the middle, so I cut myself a new handle, this time smoother than an oyster pearl.
Here's the partial assembly: I slid the insulation all the way up, then added a sewing needle, cut it, and folded what was remaining of the strip of metal over the sewing pin. As a result, it doesn't needs to be glued into the tube, it will be self-locking! and easier to replace if I break the blade.
And here's the family reunion. Quite proud of the outcome! [EDIT] Once again, it messed up the posts order, thankfully only the last picture got messed up and put at the second place. Always hate it when it happens!
item.dc:creator: MultiXMP

item.title: First Alex drawing of the new year (OC)
item.dc:creator: tkeio

item.title: *zero* cases
item.description: https://publichealthscotland.scot/news/2024/january/no-cervical-cancer-cases-detected-in-vaccinated-women-following-hpv-immunisation/ Here's the full study: https://academic.oup.com/jnci/advance-article-abstract/doi/10.1093/jnci/djad263/7577291?redirectedFrom=fulltext "No cases of invasive cancer were recorded in women immunized at 12 or 13 years of age irrespective of the number of doses. Women vaccinated at 14 to 22 years of age and given 3 doses of the bivalent vaccine showed a significant reduction in incidence compared with all unvaccinated women (3.2/100 000 [95% confidence interval (CI) = 2.1 to 4.6] vs 8.4 [95% CI = 7.2 to 9.6]). Unadjusted incidence was significantly higher in women from most deprived (Scottish Index of Multiple Deprivation 1) than least deprived (Scottish Index of Multiple Deprivation 5) areas (10.1/100 000 [95% CI = 7.8 to 12.8] vs 3.9 [95% CI = 2.6 to 5.7]). Women from the most deprived areas showed a significant reduction in incidence following 3 doses of vaccine (13.1/100 000 [95% CI = 9.95 to 16.9] vs 2.29 [95% CI = 0.62 to 5.86])." HPV is one of the vaccines the anti-vaxxers spent a lot of energy shrieking about, and condemning women to die.
item.dc:creator: TheChunguskaEvent

item.title: Apparently the Chinese government is trying to remove this video from the internet...
item.description:
A musician was live streaming in London when some Chinese communist flag waving people approached him to remove their likenesses from his video and were very confused when they were told filming in public places was perfectly acceptable in the UK. The video currently has over 5 million views.
Roman or not, all you need to do is walk away if you don't want to be seen.
When the musician, Brendan Kavanagh touched the female communist's communist flag, her "handler" got noticeably aggrevated. Quote: "You are not the same age, do not touch her!" Later the police showed up and confirmed filming was perfectly okay and apparently the Chinese party got a brief lesson about the laws of the country. I had to watch this stream twice as it was highly entertaining and these small snippets hardly do it justice. In a later video Brendan Kavanagh expressed concern the video could be removed so I'm uploading some of it here as a public service. https://www.youtube.com/live/65iwnI2hjAA
item.dc:creator: MinistryOfSillyTalks

item.title: This kind of stuff doesn't happen to me
item.description: Well the first part does. I'm well versed in that. Anyway a random imgurian messaged me and said they'd cover the repair. Wut? Cash in hand this afternoon. Seriously....shit like this doesn't happen to me. Keeping their name out of this but they know who they are. Gonna pay it forward when I can. Be excellent to each other.

item.title: Made a lil orange cats appreciation video
item.description: I had a super sweet orange and white adopted cat named Manny who passed away last year. He was blind but still sweet and shared his food with my mom's dachshund. Something about orange cats just feels special.
